heading: Omitted
label: 1281 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection, , , , which authorized the tribal governing body to use judgment funds for any purpose approved by the Secretary of the Interior, was omitted from the Code as being of special and not general application.Pub. L. 92–438, § 186 Stat. 741Sept. 29, 1972
